business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number CP-BIP-2025-4420; Form CP 00 10 10 12; Deductible $75,000; Coinsurance $80.00

Endorsement CP 15 08 (10 12); Effective 03/15/2026; Covers actual loss of Business Income during period of restoration due to suspension of operations; Business Income defined as net income plus continuing normal operating expenses including payroll
Endorsement CP 04 05 (10 12); Effective 03/15/2026; Coverage A – loss to undamaged portion of building when Covered Cause of Loss requires demolition per ordinance or law
Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12); Effective 03/15/2026; Covers direct physical loss or damage to Covered Property caused by interruption of water supply, communication supply, and power supply services
Endorsement CP 99 30 (07 88); Effective 03/15/2026; Coinsurance Additional Condition suspended during Declarations period; property value agreed to be not less than amount shown in Schedule
Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12); Effective 03/15/2026; Covers direct physical loss or damage to Covered Property from Equipment Breakdown accident to mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment

positives: Agreed Value endorsement in place, suspending coinsurance condition and eliminating coinsurance penalty risk
Broad endorsement package including Business Income, Ordinance or Law, Utility Services, and Equipment Breakdown coverages
High building limit of $146,260,000 reflecting substantial property portfolio
Business Income limit of $62,590,000 providing significant income protection
Debris Removal additional coverage up to 25% of loss amount plus additional $25,000 if inadequate
Coverage Extensions applicable given Coinsurance of 80% or more, including Newly Acquired or Constructed Property up to $250,000 per building
Pollutant Clean Up and Removal additional coverage included at $10,000 per 12-month period
Fire Department Service Charge additional coverage included up to $1,000
Electronic Data additional coverage up to $2,500 per policy year
Preservation of Property coverage for up to 30 days while being moved or temporarily stored
concerns: Deductible of $75,000 per occurrence is substantial and represents meaningful self-insured retention
Coinsurance listed at $80.00 in declarations warrants verification of correct percentage
Multiple endorsement effective dates of 03/15/2026 are mid-term, indicating these were not in force at policy inception on 09/01/2025
Vacancy clause limits coverage if building is vacant more than 60 consecutive days (vandalism, sprinkler leakage, glass breakage, water damage, theft excluded; other covered causes reduced by 15%)
Property Not Covered exclusions include land, foundations below ground surface, cost of excavations/grading, and personal property while airborne or waterborne
Valuation on actual cash value basis (not replacement cost) unless Replacement Cost option is elected per declarations

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code 6512 – Industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio.
